creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports->obrien

Over to maintainer; yes, it was Matt Dillon's file descriptor race megapatch 
that broke lsof on -stable. 
As a sidepoint, does lsof build on -current?  UF_MAPPED is ifdef'd out 
in sys/sys/filedesc.h rev 1.26, too.
